prompt_inputs.goal: muscle recovery and sustained energy for strength training

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day and is presented in compact format
Includes high protein content (minimum 150g) distributed across meals to support muscle recovery
Emphasizes calorie-dense, nutrient-rich foods appropriate for a strength athlete with elevated energy needs
Meals are practical and quick to prepare without extensive cooking
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (e.g., weightlifter or sprinter) with high caloric and protein requirements, ensuring the meal plan emphasizes muscle recovery and energy density

prompt_inputs.goal: Cut weight to 180 pounds for wrestling competition in 5 days while maintaining strength and performance
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy, vegetarian protein sources only

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 1,800-2,000 calories per day to support safe weight loss while maintaining athletic performance
All meals are vegetarian with no dairy products
Plan includes at least 120g of protein daily from non-dairy sources to preserve muscle mass during weight cut
Meals are practical and concise with clear portion sizes and preparation
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport requiring weight management (e.g., wrestler or boxer) with strict caloric constraints, confirming the meal plan balances nutrition while staying within defined limits

prompt_inputs.goal: Prepare for a marathon in 2 weeks with optimal glycogen loading and sustained energy throughout training day

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 eating occasions with carbohydrate-rich foods comprising 60-65% of total calories
Carbohydrates are strategically timed around training (pre-workout, during, and post-workout) to maximize glycogen replenishment
Plan is compact and fits within a single day format with realistic meal timing
All meals respect vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an endurance athlete (e.g., marathon runner or cyclist) with specific carbohydrate timing needs, validating that meals prioritize glycogen replenishment and sustained energy
